title: [FIRRTL] Convert register clock, reset, and init to passive during parsing

features.name: register clocked by output-forwarded wire
features.description: Code should include a register whose clock input is a wire that is also assigned to an output port, modeling a clock signal that passes through the module as both a forwarded output and a register clock

features.name: multi-hop wire alias for clock signal
features.description: Code should include a clock signal forwarded through two or more intermediate wire assignments before being used as a register clock edge trigger

features.name: output port driven by and used as clock source
features.description: Code should include a module where an output clock port is both driven from an input clock and used (via a wire) as the clock for a local register
